# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new instance with the specified raw value.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(rawValue: Int64)
```

## Discussion

If there is no value of the type that corresponds with the specified raw value, this initializer returns `nil`
title: init(rawValue:)
